headline: What Dollar General (DG)'s Strong Q1 Beat, Guidance Hike and Dividend Move Means For Shareholders
summary: In early June 2026, Dollar General reported first-quarter 2026 results showing sales of US$10,786.97 million and net income of US$444.13 million, raised its full-year 2026 guidance for net sales and diluted EPS, declared a US$0.59 quarterly dividend, and confirmed Gregory H. Hicks' appointment to the board. Alongside stronger earnings, the company signaled confidence by lifting its profit outlook while shareholders rejected several governance and human-rights-related proposals at the May 28,...

headline: Dollar General's Same-Store Sales Strength Suggests More Growth Ahead
summary: Dollar General's Q1 FY2026 same-store sales rise 2% on higher traffic, with positive comps across categories, supporting its 2.2%-2.7% view.

headline: PepsiCo and Gatik launch commercial driverless trucking deployment
summary: PepsiCo and Gatik have launched the largest commercial driverless trucking deployment to date, with operations now live across Texas, Arizona and Arkansas The post PepsiCo and Gatik launch commercial driverless trucking deployment appeared first on FreightWaves.

summary: Tesla's unsupervised robotaxi fleet is shrinking, while PepsiCo successfully operates 41 fully driverless delivery trucks.

headline: 5 Insightful Analyst Questions From Dollar General’s Q1 Earnings Call
summary: Dollar General’s first quarter results were characterized by steady growth in both sales and customer traffic, but the market responded negatively, reflecting lingering concerns about external pressures and competitive dynamics. Management pointed to effective shrink mitigation, disciplined category management, and robust execution in both consumables and non-consumables as contributors to the quarter.
